title: Freelance Niche Positioning Statement Builder Mini-Guide
description: Walks solo freelancers through a four-step framework to craft a sharp positioning statement that attracts higher-budget clients and ends the race-to-the-bottom on generalist platforms.
gumroad_description:
STOP COMPETING ON PRICE AND START ATTRACTING CLIENTS WHO VALUE YOUR EXPERTISE

You're good at what you do. So why does every client conversation feel like haggling over hourly rates?

The real problem: you haven't articulated *why* you're different. Without a clear positioning statement, you're invisible in a sea of "I do everything for everyone." Clients can't tell you apart from the next generalist, so they default to picking the cheapest option.

This guide gives you the exact framework to change that.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Freelancers who've been in the game 2+ years but keep landing low-budget projects
— Service providers tired of competing on price on Upwork, Fiverr, or other platforms
— Solo creatives (writers, designers, developers, consultants) ready to work with serious clients who pay for actual value

WHAT'S INSIDE

— A four-step positioning framework you can complete in 30 minutes
— Real examples showing weak vs. sharp positioning statements
— A quick-reference template you'll use every time you pitch
— The exact language patterns that signal premium pricing to potential clients

This is a focused, no-fluff guide. No theory. Just the steps that work.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
